title: Accessibility - Large Text
scenario: Verify that the app displays enlarged text properly across all screens when the Large Text accessibility setting is enabled at maximum slider level.
steps: Enable Large Text accessibility setting: Go to Settings > Display & Text Size > Larger Text, and move the slider to the maximum position.
Navigate through the main Poly Lens menus and verify that all text is enlarged and displayed properly without truncation or overlap.
Access device settings within the app and confirm that text is appropriately enlarged and readable.
Open the DFU (Device Firmware Update) screens and check that all text content is enlarged and clearly visible.
View onboarding and quick guide screens and ensure that text is enlarged and displayed correctly.
expected: The app displays enlarged text properly across Poly Lens menus, device settings, DFU screens, and onboarding/quick guides without truncation, overlap, or readability issues.
